title: tulipa humilis
intro: Tulipa humilis, also known as the little tulip, is a species of flowering plant in the lily family that is native to Central Asia. The bulb of the Tulipa humilis plant is used in traditional medicine and is said to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Consuming the bulb is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural diuretic. The bulb can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and powders, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
